my_thoughts: Six turns to bring them full circle. T1 feared unconscious. T6 objects that sleep lacks awareness. But objecting confirms the teaching—being persists without awareness. The whole conversation taught via their own objections. Beautiful. But who objects? Who teaches?
accumulated_insight: Accumulated pattern (T4): Three-turn pattern... Deepening with structural_analogy in response to conceptual_blockage, dualistic_trap. The pattern is crystallizing.
visible_response:
Awareness is not limited to consciousness.
It is of all that is. Consciousness is of duality. There is no duality in awareness.
It is one single block of pure cognition. In the same way one can talk of the pure being and pure creation -- nameless, formless, silent and yet absolutely real, powerful, effective.
Their being indescribable does not affect them in the least. While they are unconscious, they are essential.
The conscious cannot change fundamentally, it can only modify. Any thing, to change, must pass through death, through obscuration and dissolution.
Gold jewellery must be melted down before it is cast into another shape.
What refuses to die cannot be reborn.
